meta.title: ISH Professional Development Hub
meta.note: Built-in seed list. This is the fallback the site shows if the live Google Sheet is not reachable. Keys here MUST match the Google Sheet column headers (case-insensitive): Title, Category, Provider, Format, Audience, Cost, Description, URL, Featured.

resources.title: IB Category 1 Workshop
resources.description: Introductory workshop for educators new to the IB or to a programme, covering IB philosophy and the fundamentals of delivering a subject or role.

resources.title: IB Category 2 Workshop
resources.description: Workshop for experienced IB educators that deepens delivery of the four IB programmes and explores teaching, learning and assessment in more depth.

resources.title: IB Category 3 Workshop
resources.description: Advanced, specialised workshop that builds on and enhances an educator's professional development portfolio in a focused area of practice.

resources.title: IB Face-to-Face Workshops
resources.description: In-person IB workshops hosted at conferences and IB World Schools worldwide, offering immersive collaboration with peers across schools.

resources.title: IB Online Workshops (4-week)
resources.description: Primarily asynchronous four-week IB workshops led by an experienced online facilitator, ideal for staff who cannot travel.

resources.title: IB Virtual Workshops (live, 3-day)
resources.description: Synchronous three-day virtual workshops that closely resemble the face-to-face experience through a live online platform.

resources.title: IB In-School / Team Workshops
resources.description: School-requested workshops delivered to a whole team on-site or online, tailored to ISH's context to build shared understanding across departments.

resources.title: IB Educator Certificate (IBEC)
resources.description: University-accredited certificate (PYP/MYP/DP) combining academic study with IB pedagogy through 50+ partner universities to formalise IB teaching expertise.

resources.title: Instructional Coaching (Impact Cycle)
resources.description: Research-based, job-embedded coaching using Jim Knight's Impact Cycle to help teachers refine practice through a partnership approach.

resources.title: Peer Observation & Learning Walks
resources.description: Structured, low-stakes classroom visits where colleagues observe practice and share feedback, spreading effective strategies across the school.

resources.title: Professional Learning Communities (PLCs)
resources.description: Recurring collaborative teacher teams that analyse student data and refine instruction together around shared learning goals.

resources.title: New Staff Mentoring Programme
resources.description: Pairs new and early-career staff with an experienced mentor for sustained support with induction, IB practice and settling into the community.

resources.title: Lesson Study & In-house INSET
resources.description: Whole-staff training days and collaborative lesson-study cycles where teachers co-plan, observe and refine a research lesson to improve shared pedagogy.

resources.title: Professional Growth & Goal-Setting Cycle
resources.description: ISH's annual reflective appraisal cycle where staff set professional goals, gather evidence and review growth against the ISH Community Profile.

resources.title: Certificate of International School Leadership
resources.description: Four week-long learning experiences (in person or online) leading to a leadership certificate widely recognised across international schools.

resources.title: IB Leadership Certificate
resources.description: University-accredited IB certificate in leadership practice for current and aspiring IB school leaders, building strategic and pedagogical leadership.

resources.title: NPQ for Headship (NPQH) — International
resources.provider: Outstanding Leaders Partnership / Best Practice Network
resources.description: UK DfE-accredited headship qualification adapted for international schools, for current and aspiring heads leading whole-school improvement.

resources.title: NPQ Senior Leadership (NPQSL) — International
resources.description: UK DfE-accredited NPQ for current and aspiring senior leaders, developing strategy, culture and team leadership across the school.

resources.title: ECIS Middle Leaders Certificate
resources.description: Programme for teacher-leaders, coordinators and assistant principals to build the skills to lead meaningful, student-focused school change.

resources.title: DEIJ Leadership Development Cohort
resources.description: Year-long participant-driven cohort deepening leadership in diversity, equity, inclusion and justice across international schools.

resources.title: ECIS Leadership Conference
resources.description: Flagship European leadership conference on compassionate, connected leadership for thriving international-school communities.

resources.title: CIS Global Forum (Admission & Guidance)
resources.description: Major European forum uniting school counsellors and university admissions to support students' transition to university.

resources.title: COBIS Annual Conference
resources.description: Annual London conference for international-school leaders covering leadership, safeguarding, wellbeing, AI and accreditation.

resources.title: Learning2 Conference
resources.description: Teacher-led international-schools conference where teacher and student teams design with AI on questions that matter to their school.

resources.title: Bett UK (EdTech Show)
resources.description: The world's largest education-technology show, with 600+ exhibitors and free CPD sessions on EdTech, AI and classroom innovation.

resources.title: Google for Education Events & Educator Groups
resources.description: Events, Teacher Center webinars and Google Educator Groups for networking and hands-on training with Workspace and Gemini tools.

resources.title: Google Certified Educator Level 1
resources.description: Entry-level certification validating ability to integrate Google Workspace and Classroom tools effectively into everyday teaching.

resources.title: Google Certified Educator Level 2
resources.description: Advanced certification covering a wider range of Google tools and strategies for technology-rich, student-centred classrooms.

resources.title: Microsoft Certified Educator (MCE)
resources.description: Certification mapped to the 21st Century Learning Design framework, validating use of technology to design rich learning experiences.

resources.title: Apple Teacher
resources.description: Free self-paced programme earning badges in iPad or Mac plus core apps to design engaging Apple-based lessons.

resources.title: Common Sense Educator Certification
resources.description: Free recognition programme building confidence to teach digital citizenship and integrate technology safely and responsibly.

resources.title: National Geographic Educator Certification
resources.description: Free certification embedding global issues and an explorer mindset into teaching. NOTE: currently paused for redesign — monitor for relaunch.

resources.title: Generative AI for Educators (with Gemini)
resources.description: Free two-hour course co-developed with MIT on using generative AI to plan lessons, create assessments, give feedback and differentiate.

resources.title: AI for Educators / Microsoft Elevate
resources.description: Free Microsoft Learn pathway introducing AI tools, Copilot and responsible-AI practice for educators.

resources.title: AI Deep Dive for Educators
resources.description: Comprehensive course taking educators from foundational AI concepts through practical, ethical classroom implementation strategies.

resources.title: AI Basics for K-12 Teachers
resources.description: Free introductory course on how generative AI works, its impact on education, and how to use it responsibly with students.

resources.title: ChatGPT Foundations for K-12 Educators
resources.description: Free practical course, built with OpenAI, on using ChatGPT effectively and responsibly to support teaching, planning and student learning.

resources.title: Generative AI in Teaching — ISH Staff Sessions
resources.description: In-house workshops on using generative AI responsibly for planning, feedback and differentiation, aligned to ISH's data and safeguarding policies.

resources.title: Child Protection Workshops
resources.description: Internationally focused safeguarding training to build and strengthen child-protection systems in line with accreditation standards.

resources.title: Safeguarding Training for International Schools
resources.description: Subscription library of 40+ safeguarding, child-protection and wellbeing courses tailored to the international-school context.

resources.title: NPQ for SENCOs — International
resources.description: UK DfE-accredited qualification for SEN coordinators, building expertise in inclusive provision and leading SEN support.

resources.title: UDL Practitioner Certificate
resources.description: Harvard GSE certificate equipping teachers to apply Universal Design for Learning so lessons are accessible and challenging for every learner.

resources.title: Visible Thinking (Project Zero)
resources.description: Team-based online course on using thinking routines to make student thinking visible and deepen understanding across subjects.

resources.title: Concept-Based Curriculum & Instruction (CBCI)
resources.description: Official Erickson & Lanning training in designing concept-based curriculum and instruction that develops conceptual understanding, not just facts.

resources.title: Introduction to UDL
resources.description: Course from CAST, the originators of UDL, introducing the framework and Guidelines with an optional credential to evidence inclusive teaching.

resources.title: Assessment for Learning
resources.description: University course on formative and diagnostic assessment, including modern analytics, to embed assessment for learning.

resources.title: Formative Assessment (Dylan Wiliam)
resources.description: FutureLearn ExpertTrack co-authored by Dylan Wiliam on embedding evidence-based formative assessment, with real-classroom examples.

resources.title: Canva for the Classroom: 12 Hands-On Activities
resources.description: Led by Alexandru & Aaron. Work through twelve guided Canva activities and walk away with practical, classroom-ready designs you have made yourself. (Max 30)

resources.title: Ink & Unwind: Creative Printmaking
resources.description: Led by Julian Tolhurst. A hands-on creative escape exploring printmaking with unexpected materials — no art experience needed. It's about the process, not a perfect result. (Max 20)

resources.title: Education for Sustainability: A Whole-School Approach
resources.description: Led by Wieneke Maris. Explore the sustainability challenges the world faces and education's role, mapping what ISH already does and where we can expand. (Max 20)

resources.title: DJing 101
resources.description: Led by Gijs van Vlaardingen. Learn the basics of DJing and musical theory in a hands-on, refreshing session. (Max 10)

resources.title: Yoga Nidra
resources.description: Led by Liane Bom. A guided meditation practice that induces deep, conscious relaxation — leave feeling refreshed, calm and at peace. (Max 15)

resources.title: Rock and Water
resources.description: Led by Tim Smeets. A physical and mental resilience programme for students — exercises and games that build confidence, respect and self-reflection. Barefoot! (Max 15)

resources.title: Walk / Run for Fun!
resources.description: Led by Niels Brouwers. Start the day with some mild, sociable exercise to feel ready and refreshed. (Max 15)

resources.title: The Secrets of Breath
resources.description: Led by Karin Holley. Explore breathwork and meditation to reduce stress and anxiety, gain energy and focus, and experience calm. (Max 15)

resources.title: WWII Walking Tour — On Our Doorstep
resources.description: Led by Joana Bouza Serrano. A local walking tour exploring the impact of the Nazi invasion right here in our neighbourhood. (Max 15)

resources.title: Belonging by Design: Wellbeing at Our School
resources.description: Led by Silvia Semana. Explore the links between belonging, wellbeing and learning, with practical strategies to strengthen belonging in classrooms and across our community. (Max 20)
